summary: FPV drones destroyed two Russian soldiers on motorcycles assaulting Ukrainian positions, while another Russian soldier who faked surrender was later killed by FPV drones after attempting to flee. An FAB-3000 bomb with UMPK guidance struck a Ukrainian UAV launch site in Krasny Liman, and the Elka anti-aircraft drone performed a kinetic intercept of a Ukrainian strike UAV at 1,300 meters, detonating its warhead. Russian forces dropped fake money with QR codes over border areas using controlled Gerbera drones as a PSYOP tactic, and Ukrainian electronic warfare interference was demonstrated by forcing an FPV drone to land within 15 seconds.
